title: Aberdeen Group at DubTech '96 — Khaleej Times Photo Caption
author: Khaleej Times
abstract: A newspaper photograph caption from the Khaleej Times (Dubai, 23 March 1996) documenting Aberdeen Group's attendance at DubTech '96, a technology trade show in Dubai. The caption records a reception at the Holiday Inn Crowne Plaza attended by Sultan bin Sulayem (chairman of Dubai Ports Authority and Jebel Ali Free Zone Authority) alongside Aberdeen Group representatives Peter Kastner, John Logan, James Hurley, and Ali Kamali.
importance_rationale: Documents Aberdeen Group's international business development activity in the Gulf region in 1996, capturing a moment of early IT industry engagement with Dubai's emerging technology sector.
relevance_rationale: Primarily of archival and biographical interest; limited ongoing relevance beyond historical documentation of Aberdeen Group's geographic reach.
